inputs.name: Leadership Readiness Accelerator
inputs.description: A structured program to systematically identify and develop future leaders across LIFE Bank. This initiative includes talent mapping, accelerated development tracks, and experiential learning through stretch assignments, cross-functional projects, and mentorship by senior executives. The program is designed to strengthen the bank’s leadership pipeline and foster a high-performance culture aligned with strategic priorities.

inputs.name: Culture of Innovation and Internal Ideation Challenge
inputs.description: In our transition towards an agile business mindset, fostering creativity to tackle new challenges is crucial. We propose launching a series of “hackathons” involving senior and mid-level executives. Additionally, an internal ideation challenge will be initiated, inviting all employees to submit digital ideas for revenue generation, enhancing digital acquisitions, or improving processes. The winning idea will earn the opportunity to collaborate with the latest digital team initiative.

inputs.name: Enterprise Risk Management Framework Revamp
inputs.description: LIFE bank aims to enhance its bank-wide risk management through a comprehensive review and upgrade of the existing framework and supporting architecture. This initiative will encompass a thorough assessment of all bank processes to align with risk appetite, focusing on global standards, market risk, and credit risk. The program seeks to advance risk management methodologies and integrate risk practices into daily operational decisions.

inputs.name: Tech Transformation Program
inputs.description: Technology is the backbone of LIFE Bank. With the integration of advanced digital capabilities and the evolving customer behaviors towards technology, LIFE Bank needs to align with these changing times. LIFE Bank can choose to launch a new IT enterprise architecture to streamline application delivery across the bank. This architecture will enhance the bank’s ability to respond to agile business requests and drive innovative products.

inputs.name: AI-Powered Data Analytics Hub
inputs.description: Create a centralized data and analytics hub that integrates insights from all business units. Leveraging AI and machine learning, this hub will support better targeting, personalization, and risk assessment. It will enable data-driven decisions in customer service, product development, and strategic planning, and act as a foundation for building competitive digital experiences across segments.

inputs.name: Customer Experience Office (CXO)
inputs.description: Establish a centralized CX office to design and oversee improvements in customer experience across all physical and digital channels. The office will lead efforts in journey mapping, issue resolution, and service consistency across segments. In addition to managing performance metrics, it will partner with frontline and digital teams to prototype new service models and elevate brand trust.

inputs.name: Gamified Savings & Loyalty App
inputs.description: Launch a mobile app that encourages saving and spending with in-app goals, reward badges, and referral incentives. Customers earn points that can be redeemed for discounts, boosting both engagement and deposits.

inputs.name: Mobile-First Lending & Credit Card Offers
inputs.description: Develop a seamless mobile application process for personal loans and credit cards targeted at mass market customers. Features include instant eligibility checks, digital document upload, and AI-based offer personalization. This initiative will help LIFE Bank compete with fintechs.

inputs.name: Priority Banking Digital Concierge
inputs.description: Introduce a concierge service via mobile and web that enables affluent customers to book appointments, manage investments, and receive high-touch support from dedicated advisors. The solution blends self-service and personal attention.

inputs.name: Affluent Customer Lifecycle Insights Engine
inputs.description: Build an analytics tool that tracks affluent customer life stages and predicts evolving needs based on behavior and transaction data. The tool will trigger marketing campaigns and advisor prompts for proactive outreach.

inputs.name: SME Community & Digital Resource Hub
inputs.description: Create an online platform for SMEs to share insights, access market intelligence, and attend virtual financial advisory sessions. The hub will foster peer learning and position LIFE Bank as a thought partner for SMEs.

inputs.name: Digital Risk Assessment Engine
inputs.description: Build a credit scoring engine that uses cash flow analysis, transaction data, and industry trends to evaluate SME lending risk. This will enable faster, smarter credit approvals and customized pricing.

inputs.name: Paperless Credit & Facility Management System
inputs.description: Digitize the end-to-end credit approval process with integrated document workflows, real-time status tracking, and e-approvals. This reduces cycle time, enhances transparency, and improves internal collaboration between RMs and credit teams.

inputs.name: Green & Sustainable Lending Program
inputs.description: Launch a dedicated sustainable finance product suite for large corporate clients pursuing green projects. Offer preferential terms for ESG-compliant initiatives, supported by internal ESG risk assessment capabilities.

inputs.name: Treasury Innovation Lab
inputs.description: Set up a cross-functional innovation lab focused on developing new treasury solutions, such as hedging tools, cash pooling mechanisms, and blockchain-enabled trade finance. The lab will work closely with top clients to co-create and pilot solutions.

inputs.name: Cross-Border Liquidity & FX Suite
inputs.description: Introduce a comprehensive platform for managing regional cash flow, foreign exchange risk, and cross-border payments. This service targets multinationals and export-driven corporates with complex treasury needs.

inputs.name: Packaging
inputs.description: Invest in how the world sees your product — and how efficiently it moves from shelf to home. Every iteration refines design, usability, and scalability, transforming packaging from a cost center into a silent growth driver.

inputs.name: Material Science
inputs.description: Push the boundaries of formulation excellence. Each step forward builds resilience — in product quality, sourcing stability, and consumer trust. The stronger the science, the stronger the brand foundation.

inputs.name: Automation
inputs.description: Modern operations aren’t just faster — they’re smarter. This track builds the backbone of precision, consistency, and speed, freeing human energy for strategy while your systems handle the grind flawlessly.

inputs.name: Fragrance
inputs.description: Because performance wins the head, but scent wins the heart. Upgrading this track unlocks the sensory depth that turns a transaction into a relationship — and an everyday product into a signature experience.

inputs.name: Sustainability
inputs.description: Builds authentic environmental credibility — not messaging. Enables reduced carbon footprint, refill systems, recycled inputs, waste recovery, verified ESG compliance.

inputs.name: EPR Compliance
inputs.description: Early adoption of mandatory EPR packaging scheme ahead of regulatory deadline

inputs.name: Smart Factory 5G & IoT Integration
inputs.description: Deploy next-gen connectivity across factory floor for real-time production monitoring and quality control

inputs.name: Retail Partner Demand Sensing
inputs.description: Co-develop real-time demand forecasting using live POS data from key retail partners

inputs.name: Regional E-Commerce Marketplace Expansion
inputs.description: Launch flagship brand stores across major regional marketplaces to capture online demand growth

inputs.name: Neighbourhood & Community Trade Activation
inputs.description: Targeted in-store activation across traditional and community retail formats in high-density residential areas

inputs.name: Cross-Border Regional Distribution Hub
inputs.description: Establish centralised regional distribution hub to serve multiple markets with reduced freight and lead time

inputs.name: Sustainable Sourcing & Supplier Diversification
inputs.description: Establish a multi-supplier raw material network with sustainability-certified sources reducing single-supplier dependency and unlocking preferential long-term pricing through volume commitments

inputs.name: Autonomous Warehouse & Fleet Management Platform
inputs.description: Implement autonomous guided vehicles AI-driven inventory tracking and smart fleet routing across warehouse and distribution operations to maximise throughput and minimise manual handling costs

inputs.name: Health Authority Co-Branding Program
inputs.description: Partner with national health authority for clean ingredient certification on select product lines

inputs.name: Eco-Label Pioneer Certification
inputs.description: Achieve internationally recognised green label certification across Eco product range

inputs.name: Social Commerce & Shoppable Content Launch
inputs.description: Launch shoppable content program across major social commerce platforms targeting high-growth online demographics

inputs.name: Government Co-Investment Tech Adoption
inputs.description: Leverage government enterprise development grants for co-funded technology deployment across operations
